Services.title: Our Services — BELA MBII GARAGE
Services.hero_subtitle: From routine maintenance to complex repairs, we handle all aspects of your vehicle.

vidange.name: Oil & Filter Change
vidange.desc: Engine oil change, oil, air, and fuel filter replacement. Essential for engine longevity.

revision.name: Full Service
revision.desc: General inspection, replacement of consumables per manufacturer schedule. Your vehicle like new.

freinage.name: Brake System
freinage.desc: Pad, disc, drum, and brake fluid replacement. Optimal safety guaranteed.

amortisseurs.name: Shock Absorbers & Suspension
amortisseurs.desc: Suspension diagnosis, shock absorber and bush replacement. Improved comfort and handling.

moteur.name: Engine Repair
moteur.desc: Cylinder head, timing, gaskets, engine overhaul. Our specialist mechanics handle all engine types.

diagnostic.name: Electronic Diagnostics
diagnostic.desc: Fault code reading and clearing, OBD ECU expertise. Precise identification of any electronic fault.

electricite.name: Auto Electrics
electricite.desc: Wiring, alternator, starter motor, electrical systems. Complete solutions for all electrical problems.

carrosserie.name: Collision Repair
carrosserie.desc: Panel straightening, welding, body panel replacement. Your vehicle restored to its original appearance.

peinture.name: Paint
peinture.desc: Touch-up, partial or full paint. Professional finish for impeccable results.

debosselage.name: Dent Removal
debosselage.desc: Paintless dent repair (PDR), impact repair. Advanced technique to remove dents without repainting.

pneus.name: Tyres
pneus.desc: Fitting, balancing, rotation, puncture repair. Complete tyre service.

parebrise.name: Windscreen Replacement
parebrise.desc: Windscreen and side window removal and fitting. Fast and secure service.

clim.name: Air Conditioning
clim.desc: Recharge, diagnostics, compressor replacement. Restore thermal comfort to your vehicle.

reprogrammation.name: Reprogramming
reprogrammation.desc: ECU reprogramming, software update. Optimize your vehicle's performance.

depannage.name: Rapid Breakdown
depannage.desc: Mobile intervention, on-site diagnosis. We come to you when you break down.

remorquage.name: Towing
remorquage.desc: Collection and transport to the garage. Available for all vehicle types.

About.title: About Us — BELA MBII GARAGE
About.hero_subtitle: Over a decade of automotive expertise serving the people of Limbe and South-West Cameroon.
About.story_text: Founded in 2014 in Limbe, South-West Cameroon, BELA MBII LTD has established itself as the local reference for automotive services. Our garage was born from our founder's passion for mechanics and a clear vision: to offer Cameroonian drivers a vehicle maintenance and repair service that meets international standards.
About.story_text2: Over the years, we have invested in modern diagnostic equipment, trained our technicians in the latest automotive technologies, and developed a company culture centred on transparency, quality and customer satisfaction. Today, we are proud to serve hundreds of regular clients and to be recommended by the local community.

values.title: Excellence
values.desc: We aim for excellence in every job, with no compromise on quality.

values.title: Transparency
values.desc: Our quotes are clear and detailed. No work without your prior agreement.

values.title: Integrity
values.desc: We act with honesty and ethics in all our client relationships.

values.title: Responsiveness
values.desc: We respect deadlines and keep you informed at every stage of the job.
